body:
Hello Jessica,

We've noticed unusual behavior on your Apple account. Multiple failed login attempts were detected from Manila.

**What happened:**
- 6 failed login attempts in the last hour
- Access from unrecognized device
- Possible credential stuffing attack

**To protect your account:**
1. Click here to secure your account: https://apple-security-portal.com
2. Change your password
3. Enable two-factor authentication

Failure to act within 36 hours will result in account restriction.

Thank you,
Apple Fraud Prevention Team

subject: Security Alert: Unauthorized access detected
body:
Hello Amelia,

We've noticed unusual behavior on your Netflix account. Multiple failed login attempts were detected from Mumbai.

**What happened:**
- 12 failed login attempts in the last hour
- Access from unrecognized device
- Possible credential stuffing attack

**To protect your account:**
1. Click here to secure your account: https://secure-netflix.info/confirm
2. Change your password
3. Enable two-factor authentication

Failure to act within 23 hours will result in account restriction.

Thank you,
Netflix Fraud Prevention Team
